name: GOLFOS LAB
about: GOLFOS LAB is a private, members-only golf studio located on Key Biscayne, offering an upscale, climate-controlled environment for serious practice. It is powered by Foresight Sports simulators and provides precise ball-flight data, gapping, and on-course play. Members benefit from 24/7 keypad-PIN access, lounge amenities, complimentary Wi-Fi, and HD TVs. The venue offers memberships with plans ranging from 8 to 26 simulator hours per month, along with clinics and lessons for all ages and skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Precise ball-flight data from Foresight Sports technology trusted by professionals
24/7 access with keypad-PIN allows practice anytime, rain or shine
Comprehensive practice environment with lounge, Wi-Fi, and TVs for a comfortable experience

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service; BYOB policy is not specified
Complimentary beverages are mentioned for members, but external alcohol is not confirmed

simulator_hardware.notes: Powered by Foresight Sports simulators with performance technology trusted by pros

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state if club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website mentions complimentary beverages for members but does not specify a policy on outside food or drinks, so it is best to inquire directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific timing for 18 holes, but sessions are typically booked by the hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFOS LAB offers clinics for kids, focusing on fun, fundamentals, and skill games, making it suitable for junior golfers.
